data.title: Japan PM to call on G7 to address North Korea’s crypto theft
data.description:
Shigeru Ishiba, the prime minister of Japan, will urge the G7 to confront North Korea's crypto theft activities.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/japan-g7-north-koreas-crypto-theft/

data.title: Tether acquires 31.9% stake in Elemental Altus
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Tether acquires strategic equity in Elemental Altus, a Canada-based listed gold royalty company, with a strategy to integrate long-term stable assets such as gold and Bitcoin into its ecosystem. Tether acquired 78,421,780 common shares of Elemental, accounting for approximately 31.9% of Elemental's issued and outstanding shares. The transaction was completed overseas through a private agreement.

data.title: SEC Blocks DeFi Corp’s $1B Solana Buying Spree
data.description:
Key Points: DeFi Development Corp has withdrawn its S-3 registration filing with the US SEC after the agency said the company was not eligible to file the form. The Nasdaq-listed firm disclosed on Wednesday that it had failed to include a management report on internal control over financial reporting, a requirement for Form S-3 eligibility.
source: https://coincu.com/342844-sec-blocks-defi-corps-1b-solana-buying-spree

data.title: A certain address bought 18.9 million AURA at a low price yesterday, with a return rate of 26 times
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to monitoring by The Data Nerd, a certain address spent US$63,800 to buy 18.9 million AURA yesterday, and then sold 3 million AURA for US$57,000. It currently still holds 15.9 million AURA (approximately US$1.7 million), with a return on investment of 26 times.

data.title: Tether Acquires Strategic Stake in Canadian Gold Royalty Firm
data.description: According to Foresight News, Tether has acquired a strategic equity stake in Elemental Altus, a publicly listed gold royalty company based in Canada. This move aims to integrate long-term stable assets like gold and Bitcoin into Tether's ecosystem. Tether purchased 78,421,780 common shares of Elemental, representing approximately 31.9% of the company's issued and outstanding shares. The transaction was completed through a private agreement conducted offshore.

data.title: A whale withdrew 33,500 ETH from Binance in the past two days, equivalent to about 93.5 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale/institution "0xFC82" withdrew 33,500 ETH (93.5 million US dollars) from Binance in the past two days.

data.title: Bitcoin's Ledger Technology Surpasses Gold's Historical Role, Analyst Says
data.description:
According to Foresight News, cryptocurrency analyst Willy Woo recently shared his views on the evolving role of gold and Bitcoin in the realm of ledger technology. Woo highlighted that gold's industrial applications and its abundant availability in the universe diminish its status as an immutable monetary ledger. He emphasized that true value lies in ledger technology, which gold has represented for the past 6,000 years.

Woo argued that Bitcoin now stands as the superior ledger technology, surpassing gold's historical significance. He noted that perceiving actual value as industrial value indicates a misunderstanding of currency's essence, which is fundamentally a ledger technology. Woo concluded that Bitcoin represents a perfected form of ledger technology, offering a modern alternative to gold's longstanding role.

data.title: peaq and Pulsar Group Launch Sandbox for AI and Robotics in UAE
data.description:
According to PANews, Layer1 blockchain company peaq has partnered with Pulsar Group to introduce a dedicated sandbox in the United Arab Emirates. This initiative aims to explore the integration of robotics and artificial intelligence within a decentralized economy. The collaboration has led to the establishment of the 'Machine Economy Free Zone' in Dubai, which combines regulation, infrastructure, and investment to advance decentralized, machine economy-specific use cases.

The program is designed to provide a controlled environment for developers, businesses, and government stakeholders to test and develop machine economy applications, including DePIN networks. Max Thake, co-founder of peaq, explained that the free zone will build a 'human-centric economic system' where autonomous robots and smart devices can generate value and earn rewards.

Potential applications include community-driven air quality monitoring, hyper-localized weather forecasting, and virtual power plants composed of user devices. The project introduces an innovative 'Universal Basic Ownership' (UBO) mechanism, which aims to distribute a portion of the wealth created by robots to groups affected by automation-induced unemployment through tokenization.

data.title: Bitrue hackers are currently using 16.345 million DAI to buy ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Ember, the Bitrue hacker is currently using 16.345 million DAI to buy ETH, and then laundering the ETH through Tornado. And these DAI are the proceeds from selling ETH at a price of $3,885 in March last year. The hacker stole a variety of tokens worth $23 million from the Bitrue exchange in April 2023, and then exchanged these assets for ETH; in March 2024, he sold 4,207 ETH at a price of $3,885 for 16.345 million DAI; 1 hour ago, he transferred DAI and ETH to a new address, and is currently buying DAI for ETH, and then laundering ETH through Tornado.

data.title: A trader lost millions of profits by selling prematurely, and AURA soared 128 times in two days
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain, the market value of AURA soared from US$900,000 to more than US$110 million in two days. A trader with the address HAkvH2 previously held 10.45 million AURA. Six months later, he sold them at a loss of US$38,000 two days before the rise, missing out on potential profits of more than one million US dollars.

data.title: QCP Capital: The macro environment remains conducive to further institutional participation in digital assets and capital allocation
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News QCP Capital's official channel said that the market welcomed the tentative progress in Sino-US relations. President Trump announced a partial withdrawal of the proposed tariff increase plan, and the agreement has entered the final stage and is awaiting formal approval. However, optimism remains suppressed. The US Secretary of Commerce took a tough stance on technology exports, making it clear that the United States "will not provide China with the most advanced chips." This highlights the trend of differentiation in the global supply chain, and the market is increasingly incorporating this factor into the pricing considerations of cross-border trade dynamics. Geopolitical tensions have heated up again, and the United States has begun to withdraw diplomats from the Middle East as nuclear negotiations have reached a deadlock. Washington has reportedly received warnings that Israel may launch a strike on Iran's nuclear facilities, triggering a sharp reaction in the oil market. Brent crude oil rose 7%-9% during the day, and risky assets were sold off as investors turned to defensive assets. In addition, speculation that Bessant might succeed Jerome Powell as Chairman of the Federal Reserve heated up, but was quickly diluted. Bessant publicly reiterated his commitment to serve in the Treasury Department until 2029. Meanwhile, after the US CPI data was lower than expected, President Trump again pressured the Federal Reserve to "cut interest rates by 100 basis points across the board," arguing that high debt servicing costs were unsustainable. QCP Capital believes that despite a small correction, the macro environment is still conducive to further institutional participation in digital assets and capital allocation.

data.title: Backpack will issue WCT airdrops to badge holders for the second time
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Backpack will issue WCT airdrops to badge holders for the second time. The specific activity time is from 08:00 (UTC+8) on June 12, 2025 to 08:00 (UTC+8) on June 18. Users with Challenger, Diamond or Platinum levels can participate in the collection. In addition, 500+ users from other levels will be randomly selected to qualify. Users can participate by connecting the Backpack wallet (browser plug-in or mobile terminal) to the Backpack exchange account before 08:00 UTC+8 on June 18. Badges are obtained by participating in the Backpack Season 1 points event. The next season has not yet been officially announced, so please stay tuned.

data.title: Brazil's parliament considers establishing a strategic reserve of Bitcoin, intends to invest 5% of international reserves
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Brazilian House of Representatives is deliberating on Bill No. 4501 of 2024, which proposes the establishment of a sovereign strategic reserve of Bitcoin (RESBit), and plans to use up to 5% of international reserves to purchase Bitcoin. The bill aims to diversify treasury assets, resist exchange rate fluctuations and geopolitical risks, promote the development of blockchain technology, and provide support for the Brazilian digital currency (Drex). The reserve will be jointly managed by the Central Bank of Brazil and the Ministry of Finance, using security technologies such as cold wallets and establishing a strict transparency mechanism. Rapporteur Luiz Gastão has voted in favor of the bill, emphasizing that a cautious and gradual implementation strategy will be adopted to balance potential benefits and risks.

data.title: Jack Ma’s Ant International eyes stablecoin licenses in Singapore, Hong Kong
data.description:
Ant International plans to apply for stablecoin licenses in Hong Kong and Singapore, signaling growing fintech interest in regulated crypto payment systems, Bloomberg reported.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/jack-ma-ant-group-stablecoin-license-for-singapore-hong-kong?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Hong Kong Securities Regulator Proposes Expansion of Restricted Titles
data.description: According to PANews, the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) has proposed an expansion of the list of restricted titles under the Securities and Futures Ordinance and the Anti-Money Laundering Ordinance. The proposed changes aim to include terms such as 'trading platform' and 'virtual assets' to prevent unregulated entities from misleading the public. The consultation period for this proposal is open until August 11, 2025.

data.title: Japanese Fashion Brand ANAP Holdings Increases Bitcoin Holdings
data.description: According to Foresight News, Japanese fashion brand ANAP Holdings has recently increased its Bitcoin holdings by approximately 50.56 BTC over the past two days. This acquisition brings the company's total Bitcoin holdings to 153.4627 BTC.
